rows.label: tev001591_MSG0001
rows.name:
Did the backwater peasants who raised you
neglect to teach you basic manners? It's
considered impolite to interrupt at teatime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0002
rows.name:
You seem somewhat dubious that I am
actually enjoying tea at the moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, I assure you, this is a fine cup
of Ceylon tea. Or as fine as any knock-off
manufactured here in NLA, at least.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_JNK0010
rows.name: Request

rows.label: tev001591_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask to join the Murderess for tea.

rows.label: tev001591_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001591_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask the Murderess about the man she's with.

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you leave me alone, we can split
a ration at some point down the
road and call it dinner. Deal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0005
rows.name:
We're in the middle of an important
conversation, and it really can't
be interrupted. Bye now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0006
rows.name:
Let's say he's a business
partner of mine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0007
rows.name:
We're in the middle of an important
conversation, and it really can't
be interrupted. Bye now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_JNK0110
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001591_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask the Murderess what they're discussing.

rows.label: tev001591_JNK0120
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: tev001591_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask the Murderess if this is another of her evil schemes.

rows.label: tev001591_JNK0130
rows.name: Appeal

rows.label: tev001591_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask the Murderess if you can get in on the action.

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0008
rows.name: I'm afraid that's a secret.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0009
rows.name:
But I assure you, no one is being
cheated, and no one is in danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm just...buying a
dream, you could say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I'm afraid I can't say anything more than
that. We'll speak in the administrative district
once there's an actual BLADE mission to discuss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0012
rows.name: Until then, good-bye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0013
rows.name:
Is that how you think of me?
That is shocking, appalling, and
not in any way unreasonable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0014
rows.name:
But I'll have you know that our
new venture does not involve
deceiving or endangering anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm just...buying a
dream, you could say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0016
rows.name:
But I'm afraid I can't say anything more than
that. We'll speak in the administrative district
once there's an actual BLADE mission to discuss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0017
rows.name: Until then, good-bye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0018
rows.name:
Are you a hyena dressed as
a[ST:gender p1= man p2= woman ]? I make the kill, yet you
desire a share of the meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0019
rows.name:
You have to be careful about horning in
on every money-making scheme you discover.
It can be bad for your health.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0020
rows.name:
Go find your own money. And maybe some
self-respect while you're at it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0021
rows.name:
I don't wish to speak any more of this venture.
We'll catch up in the administrative district
once there are BLADE missions to discuss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001591_MSG0022
rows.name: Until then, good-bye.[ST:wait ]
